rulings.Case Title: "ROE 1" et al VS. BIJOU GROUP,INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Sever Claims Of Roe 3(Formerly Roe 3) As To Deft Bijou-Century, Llc For Separate Trial
rulings.Rulings: THIS TENTATIVE RULING IS LATE. ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, AUGUST 14, 2006. PLAINTIFF "ROE 1", "ROE 2", "ROE 3" Motion To Sever Claims Of Roe 3(Formerly Roe 3) As To Deft Bijou-Century, LLC For Separate Trial IS DENIED BECAUSE MOTION TO AMEND PLAINTIFF IS DENIED AND ROE 3 CLAIMS STAYED BY ARBITRATION. =(302PHA/HE)

rulings.Case Title: "ROE 1" et al VS. BIJOU GROUP,INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Otion For Leave To File Amended Pleading
rulings.Rulings: THIS TENTATIVE RULING IS LATE. ON CALENDAR FOR MONDAY, AUGUST 14, 2006. PLAINTIFF "ROE 1", "ROE 2", "ROE 3" MOtion For Leave To File Amended Pleading. 1.) DENY LEAVE TO AMEND TO NAME NEW DEFENDANTS, DID NOT SHOW GENUINE IGNORANCE OF THESE DEFENDANTS AND WAIVED LEAVE TO AMEND AFTER AUGUST 5, 2006 DEMURRER. 2.) DENY LEAVE TO AMEND TO SUBSTANCE ROE 4 FOR ROE 3 BECAUSE ROE 4 UNSUITABLE. 3.) GRANT LEAVE TO AMEND NEW CAUSES OF ACTION AS TO CENTURY ONLY. =(302/PHA/HE)
